title: Perfectly Charred Polish Custard Grill
description: A charred, silky, and cozy Polish dish featuring custard powder, grilled to perfection on a yakimono-grill, this dessert is sure to delight, with a dash-friendly approach to ingredients and preparation.

ingredients.name: custard powder
ingredients.notes: available at most baking supply stores

instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the custard powder, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a grill-safe dish and dot the top with butter.
Place the dish on the preheated grill and cook for 20 minutes, or until the top is charred and the custard is set.
Remove the dish from the grill and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the custard warm, garnished with a sprinkle of sugar if desired.
